results.planetDesc: Each planet colors a facet of your personality.
results.elementDesc: The balance of forces in your birth chart.
results.houseDesc: The life domains activated by your planets.
results.aspectDesc: The dialogues between your planets — harmonies and tensions.
results.noAspects: No major aspects detected in your chart.
results.lifeThemesDesc: The guiding threads that weave your birth chart into a unique story.

closing.title: One last word,
closing.p1: This chart is a photograph of the sky at the exact moment of your birth — a unique instant in the history of the cosmos. It predicts nothing. It determines nothing. It illuminates.
closing.p2: The planets draw potentials, invitations, creative tensions. It is you who chooses how to live them, transform them, transcend them.
closing.p3: You are the author of your story — the sky is merely the backdrop.
closing.quote: The wise rule the stars; the stars do not rule the wise.

results.disclaimer: Astrology is a tool for personal reflection inspired by ancient traditions. It is in no way a substitute for medical, psychological, or financial advice.

transits.title: Today's Transits
transits.desc: Current planetary positions and how they interact with your birth chart.
transits.noTime: Enable birth time to see transits in houses.

footer.disclaimer: Astrology is a tool for reflection, not a substitute for medical or professional advice.
